sentences.arabic: تُبْرِزُ سِيرَةُ الصَّحَابَةِ الْكِرَامِ نَمَاذِجَ فَرِيدَةً فِي التَّضْحِيَةِ وَالْوَفَاءِ، وَلَعَلَّ مَوْقِفَ أَبِي بَكْرٍ الصِّدِّيقِ -رَضِيَ اللهُ عَنْهُ- أَثْنَاءَ الْهِجْرَةِ يَعْكِسُ عُمْقَ الْمَحَبَّةِ لِلنَّبِيِّ ﷺ.
sentences.translation: Sira (biografija) plemenitih ashaba ističe jedinstvene primjere žrtvovanja i vjernosti, a postupak Ebu Bekra es-Siddika, radijallahu anhu, tokom Hidžre odražava dubinu ljubavi prema Vjerovjesniku, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem.
sentences.translationEn: The biography of the noble Companions highlights unique examples of sacrifice and loyalty, and perhaps the stance of Abu Bakr al-Siddiq (may Allah be pleased with him) during the Hijrah reflects the depth of love for the Prophet (PBUH).

sentences.arabic: فَحِينَمَا كَانَا فِي الْغَارِ وَأَحَاطَ بِهِمَا الْمُشْرِكُونَ، لَمْ يَخَفْ أَبُو بَكْرٍ عَلَى نَفْسِهِ، بَلْ كَانَ قَلِقًا عَلَى سَلَامَةِ الرَّسُولِ ﷺ.
sentences.translation: Kada su bili u pećini, a mušrici ih opkolili, Ebu Bekr se nije bojao za sebe, već je bio zabrinut za sigurnost Poslanika, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem.
sentences.translationEn: When they were in the cave and the polytheists surrounded them, Abu Bakr did not fear for himself, but was anxious for the safety of the Messenger (PBUH).

sentences.arabic: فَقَدْ طَمْأَنَهُ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ بِأَنَّ اللهَ مَعَهُمَا، وَأَنَّ مَنْ كَانَ اللهُ نَاصِرَهُ فَلَا غَالِبَ لَهُ [أَخْرَجَهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ فَضَائِلِ الصَّحَابَةِ، رَقْمُ ٣٦٥٣].
sentences.translation: Vjerovjesnik ga je umirio rekavši da je Allah s njima i da onome kome je Allah pomagač, niko ga ne može pobijediti [Buhari, Knjiga o odlikama ashaba, br. 3653].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (PBUH) reassured him that Allah was with them, and that whoever has Allah as a helper, none can overcome him [Reported by al-Bukhari in the Book of the Virtues of the Companions, No. 3653].

sentences.arabic: هَذَا الثَّبَاتُ فِي لَحَظَاتِ الشِّدَّةِ يُعَدُّ دَرْسًا بَلِيغًا فِي مَعْنَى الصُّحْبَةِ الصَّالِحَةِ وَالتَّفَانِي فِي سَبِيلِ الْعَقِيدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ova postojanost u trenucima nedaće smatra se rječitom lekcijom o značenju dobrog društva i požrtvovanosti na putu akide.
sentences.translationEn: This steadfastness in moments of hardship is an eloquent lesson in the meaning of righteous companionship and dedication for the sake of the creed.

sentences.arabic: وَيُعَلِّقُ الشَّيْخُ ابْنُ عُثَيْمِينَ -رَحِمَهُ اللهُ- عَلَى هَذِهِ الْحَادِثَةِ بِأَنَّهَا تُبَيِّنُ فَضْلَ أَبِي بَكْرٍ عَلَى سَائِرِ الْأُمَّةِ، حَيْثُ اخْتَارَهُ اللهُ لِيَكُونَ رَفِيقَ الدَّرْبِ فِي أَخْطَرِ رِحْلَةٍ تَارِيخِيَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Šejh Ibn Uthaymeen komentariše ovaj događaj navodeći da on pokazuje prednost Ebu Bekra nad ostatkom ummeta, jer ga je Allah odabrao da bude saputnik na najopasnijem historijskom putovanju.
sentences.translationEn: Sheikh Ibn Uthaymeen comments on this incident stating that it demonstrates Abu Bakr's merit over the rest of the Ummah, as Allah chose him to be the companion on the most dangerous historical journey.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الْهِجْرَةَ لَمْ تَكُنْ مُجَرَّدَ انْتِقَالٍ مَكَانِيٍّ، بَلْ كَانَتْ فَيْصَلًا بَيْنَ الْحَقِّ وَالْبَاطِلِ، وَتَأْسِيسًا لِدَوْلَةِ الْإِسْلَامِ الْقَائِمَةِ عَلَى التَّوْحِيدِ.
sentences.translation: Hidžra nije bila samo prostorna selidba, već prekretnica između istine i neistine, te utemeljenje islamske države zasnovane na tewhidu (monoteizmu).
sentences.translationEn: The Hijrah was not merely a spatial transition, but a criterion between truth and falsehood, and the foundation of the Islamic state based on Tawhid.

sentences.arabic: وَمِنْ هُنَا، يَتَعَلَّمُ الْمُسْلِمُ أَنَّ النَّصْرَ يَقْتَرِنُ بِالصَّبْرِ وَالثِّقَةِ الْمُطْلَقَةِ بِوَعْدِ اللهِ، وَأَنَّ الشَّدَائِدَ هِيَ الَّتِي تَصْقُلُ مَعَادِنَ الرِّجَالِ وَتَكْشِفُ صِدْقَ إِيمَانِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Iz ovoga musliman uči da je pobjeda povezana sa strpljenjem i apsolutnim povjerenjem u Allahovo obećanje, te da su nedaće te koje kale karaktere ljudi i otkrivaju iskrenost njihovog imana.
sentences.translationEn: From this, a Muslim learns that victory is coupled with patience and absolute trust in Allah's promise, and that hardships are what refine the mettle of men and reveal the sincerity of their faith.
